records.m_Talk_ENG: According to records, this should be where the residents of Eridu lived.
records.m_Talk_DEU: According to records, this should be where the residents of Eridu lived.
records.m_Talk_FRA: According to records, this should be where the residents of Eridu lived.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a dry desert now, but they say it used to be a port city.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a dry desert now, but they say it used to be a port city.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a dry desert now, but they say it used to be a port city.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And right here was one of the entrances to Eridu...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And right here was one of the entrances to Eridu...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And right here was one of the entrances to Eridu...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, this area is believed to be where Eridu was located.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, this area is believed to be where Eridu was located.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, this area is believed to be where Eridu was located.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sandstorm has gotten stronger. And with it, the Corruption ray density must have also increased.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sandstorm has gotten stronger. And with it, the Corruption ray density must have also increased.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sandstorm has gotten stronger. And with it, the Corruption ray density must have also increased.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm able to endure it, but... I'm worried about you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm able to endure it, but... I'm worried about you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm able to endure it, but... I'm worried about you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm okay. There's still a lot of charge left in my Eternium shield!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm okay. There's still a lot of charge left in my Eternium shield!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm okay. There's still a lot of charge left in my Eternium shield!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be fine!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be fine!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be fine!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Plus, I'm going to see Eridu with my own eyes. I can't miss out on an opportunity like this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Plus, I'm going to see Eridu with my own eyes. I can't miss out on an opportunity like this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Plus, I'm going to see Eridu with my own eyes. I can't miss out on an opportunity like this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eternium shields used to be so rare that we couldn't use them so recklessly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eternium shields used to be so rare that we couldn't use them so recklessly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eternium shields used to be so rare that we couldn't use them so recklessly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, how the world has changed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, how the world has changed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, how the world has changed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just by looking at your appearance, you look around my age. But this is where I feel a generation gap...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just by looking at your appearance, you look around my age. But this is where I feel a generation gap...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just by looking at your appearance, you look around my age. But this is where I feel a generation gap...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Same here. I feel like I'm the guide here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Same here. I feel like I'm the guide here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Same here. I feel like I'm the guide here.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Why am I in front when you know the path
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Why am I in front when you know the path
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Why am I in front when you know the path
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's that sound again...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's that sound again...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's that sound again...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Aditya! Are you okay?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Aditya! Are you okay?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Aditya! Are you okay?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Follow me.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Follow me.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Follow me.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>This way.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>This way.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>This way.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>I have been waiting for you.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>I have been waiting for you.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>I have been waiting for you.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8gya! Miss Aditya!
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8gya! Miss Aditya!
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8gya! Miss Aditya!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wake up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wake up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wake up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where am I...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where am I...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where am I...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why did you suddenly start running?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why did you suddenly start running?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why did you suddenly start running?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Were you allured by a C.O.? Are you sure you're okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Were you allured by a C.O.? Are you sure you're okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Were you allured by a C.O.? Are you sure you're okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I saw an illusion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I saw an illusion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I saw an illusion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: People were screaming and bullets were flying... in a city where death was imminent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: People were screaming and bullets were flying... in a city where death was imminent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: People were screaming and bullets were flying... in a city where death was imminent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you seeing things too? I-it's not the Corruption Syndrome, is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you seeing things too? I-it's not the Corruption Syndrome, is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you seeing things too? I-it's not the Corruption Syndrome, is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone called me to this place... It was a very familiar voice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone called me to this place... It was a very familiar voice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone called me to this place... It was a very familiar voice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know that I've been here before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know that I've been here before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know that I've been here before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-there really is a city within the sandstorm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-there really is a city within the sandstorm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-there really is a city within the sandstorm...
